cases.name: ide-core-kill-line-and-yank
cases.expr: (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-make-buffer "scratch" (list "abc")))) (s1 (ide-apply-command s0 1118 nil)) (s2 (ide-apply-command s1 1119 nil))) (list (ide-buffer-lines (ide-state-buffer s2)) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s2))))
